description_en: A traditional Chinese desk lamp with wooden base and stem, fabric shade with wooden top and bottom rings, and spherical finial. Style features dark hardwood construction with subtle turned details on the stem.

components.name: socket_holder
components.description: Transition disk between stem and socket, supports shade frame

components.name: socket
components.description: Bulb socket/holder, brass or ceramic insert

components.name: bulb
components.position_note: inside socket, centered within shade cavity

components.name: shade_bottom_ring
components.description: Wooden bottom ring of lampshade frame
components.position_note: resting on socket_holder, outer edge of shade

components.name: shade_top_ring
components.description: Wooden top ring of lampshade frame, smaller diameter
components.position_note: top of shade, 0.20m above bottom ring

components.name: shade_diffuser
components.description: Fabric or parchment shade body, truncated cone shape

components.name: finial
components.description: Decorative knob on top of shade

style_notes: Traditional Chinese joinery with mortise-tenon connections for wooden parts; base and stem in dark hardwood (zitan or hongmu) with subtle lathe-turned bamboo-node detailing on stem; shade frame in matching wood; shade surface in rice paper or silk with possible ink-wash landscape or calligraphy motifs (surface texture, not geometry); brass hardware at socket; proportions follow 0.6 leg-to-total ratio for vertical elements.
